LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-04-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS WALMART INC., AND WAL-MART.COM USA, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES FAILED TO MEET AND CONFER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 3, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS WALMART INC., AND WAL-MART.COM USA, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The parties failed to meet and confer in compliance with CCP 430.41. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with the code. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by December 3, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
